  분석하겠습니다. 먼저 핵심 파일들을
  확인하겠습니다.

[38;5;75m●[39m Searched for [1m2[0m patterns, read [1m1[0m file
  [38;5;246m(ctrl+o[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mexpand)

[38;5;75m●[39m Read [1m1[0m file [38;5;246m(ctrl+o[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mexpand)[39m

[38;5;239m[48;5;237m❯ [38;5;231mclean architecture, single         [39m[49m
[38;5;231m[48;5;237m  responsibility principle,          [39m[49m
[38;5;231m[48;5;237m  interface-oriented programming     [39m[49m
[38;5;231m[48;5;237m  관점에서 구조를 분석하고 어긋난    [39m[49m
[38;5;231m[48;5;237m  부분을 개선하자.                   [39m[49m

[38;5;231m●[39m 사용자의 새 요청에 따라 [1mClean[0m
  [1mArchitecture,[0m [1mSRP,[0m [1mInterface-Oriented[0m
  [1mProgramming[0m 관점에서 구조를
  분석하겠습니다.

[38;5;246m [39m [1mExplore[0m(Analyze architecture
         principles)
  ⎿  
    [1mSearch[0m(pattern: "src/main/java/com/a

    [38;5;246m+4[39m [38;5;246mmore[39m [38;5;246mtool[39m [38;5;246muses[39m [38;5;246m(ctrl+o[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mexpand)[39m
     [38;5;246mctrl+b[39m [38;5;246mctrl+b[39m [38;5;246m(twice)[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mrun[39m [38;5;246min[39m
     [38;5;246mbackground[39m

[38;5;215m✶[39m [38;5;215mMeandering… [38;5;246m(8m[39m [38;5;246m31s[39m [38;5;246m·[39m [38;5;246m↓[39m [38;5;246m4.3k[39m [38;5;246mtokens)[39m


  [38;5;239m[48;5;237m❯ [38;5;231ms/w architect 관점에서 현재 구조를 [39m[49m
  [38;5;231m[48;5;237m   분석하고 결합도, 책임 분리,       [39m[49m
  [38;5;231m[48;5;237m  확장성, 테스트 용이성 측면 개선    [39m[49m
  [38;5;231m[48;5;237m  포인트를 찾아 적용하자.            [39m[49m
[2m[38;5;244m─────────────────────────────────────────
[0m[38;5;246m❯ [7m[39mP[0;2mress[0m [2mup[0m [2mto[0m [2medit[0m [2mqueued[0m [2mmessages[0m
[2m[38;5;244m─────────────────────────────────────────
[0m  [38;5;246mesc[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246minterrupt[39m
